data.title: Jeff Glickman joins Neal Gerber Eisenberg as Partner in Private Wealth, bringing expertise in estate planning and tax strategies, enhancing firm's practice.
data.description: In Chicago, Neal Gerber Eisenberg (NGE) welcomes Jeffrey (Jeff) D. Glickman as a new partner in its Private Wealth practice group. Bringing with him expertise in estate planning, wealth transfer techniques, and trust administration, Jeff enriches NGE's offerings in this area. With a focus on intricate financial planning and substantial tax strategy experience, Jeff enhances the practice's capabilities. His role involves developing comprehensive strategies for clients in the realm of estate planning and wealth management.

data.title: Baddeck LTC workers at Alderwood Rest Home vote 99% in favor of strike for better wages and job retention, joining over 30 CUPE locals.
data.description: In Baddeck, Nova Scotia, employees at Alderwood Rest Home, who are members of the Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) 1635, have overwhelmingly voted in favor of a strike mandate with 99% support. This decision was made in response to over 30 other CUPE long-term care locals also demanding better wages and retention policies. CUPE 1635 President, Elsa Rob, highlighted the challenging conditions in long-term care by emphasizing the significant physical, emotional, and financial toll faced by workers. This collective action by thousands of workers reflects the urgent need for improvements in the long-term care sector.

data.title: Norris McLaughlin, P.A. adds real estate attorneys H. Michael Lynch, Kimberly Yeager, and Chavala Kobluk from Lynch and Associates.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, in New York, the law firm of Norris McLaughlin, P.A. welcomed a strong group of real estate attorneys to their team. This includes H. Michael Lynch, Esq. and Kimberly Yeager, Esq. who were previously with Lynch and Associates in Manhattan and Long Island. This addition further bolsters the firm's real estate expertise.

data.title: Fed may pause rate cuts due to strong economy. Powell's term ends on May 15 but may continue as Fed governor. S&P 500 fluctuates.
data.description: Chairman Powell's term is set to conclude on May 15, but there is a possibility for him to continue as a Federal Reserve governor. The Federal Reserve's decision to halt rate cuts may be prolonged due to the strong state of the economy. The S&P 500 index fluctuates amid this development.

data.title: University of Phoenix webinar on building high-performing teams in AI era offers insights for leaders. Date: Jan. 28, 2026.
data.description: In the upcoming webinar on Jan. 28, 2026, the University of Phoenix will provide practical insights for leaders dealing with workforce trends influenced by artificial intelligence, organizational transformations, and shifting employee demands. This event is part of the Bridging Perspectives series and aims to offer guidance on navigating these challenges. This webinar is crucial for leaders seeking to understand the impact of AI and evolving expectations on their organizations.

data.title: Dogecoin and Shiba Inu are consolidating, DOGE dropped 7% to $0.1175-$0.1287, rebounding to $0.1250. Shib is in a similar position with no clear breakout catalyst.
data.description: Dogecoin and Shiba Inu are currently trading in narrow ranges following significant declines, lacking a clear reason for a breakout. Dogecoin (DOGE) is consolidating between $0.1175 and $0.1287 after a 7% drop from $0.1260 to around $0.1175, where buyers intervened to push the price back to approximately $0.1250. DOGE is slightly above the 0.5 Fibonacci retracement at $0.1232 and aiming to reclaim the 0.618 level near $0.1244. The hourly Relative Strength Index (RSI) sits at 56.20, indicating neutral momentum with a slight bullish bias after recovering from oversold territory during the previous day's selloff.

data.title: Another potential U.S. government shutdown looms if funding isn't agreed upon by Jan. 30, 2026, prompting travel insurance advice from Squaremouth.
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida, as of January 28, 2026, the potential for another U.S. government shutdown looms if Congress fails to agree on a funding arrangement by January 30, 2026. Squaremouth, a prominent travel insurance comparison platform, aims to educate travelers on how this impending situation could impact them.

data.title: Nomura's Swiss crypto arm applies for US banking charter with OCC, joining growing trend in the industry.
data.description: A Swiss branch of Nomura, a prominent Japanese investment banking company, is among the latest crypto companies aiming to obtain a national bank charter from the OCC in the U.S.

data.title: ARC to host nationwide 2026 Launch Events to train future church planters. BIRMINGHAM, Ala., Jan. 28, 2026 - PRNewswire.
data.description: The 2026 ARC Launch Events have been revealed by the Association of Related Churches, a series of in-person trainings set to take place nationwide. These events aim to provide guidance and readiness for upcoming church planters. The announcement was made in Birmingham, Alabama on January 28, 2026. The Association of Related Churches stated that this year's ARC Launch Events will be crucial for individuals looking to establish new churches.

data.title: RGC Resources, Inc. will hold its Q1 2026 earnings call on Feb 10, 2026 at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Visit https://www.rgcresources.com for presentation materials.
data.description: In Roanoke, Virginia, on January 28, 2026, RGC Resources, Inc. (Nasdaq: RGCO) announced its upcoming quarterly conference call and webcast regarding its fiscal first quarter 2026 results. This event is scheduled for Tuesday, February 10, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Presentation materials will be accessible on the company's website in advance of the call on the Investor & Financial Information page at https://www.rgcresources.com/investor-financial-information/.

data.title: RAYUS Radiology renews partnerships with US Ski & Snowboard, US Speedskating, and USA Bobsled/Skeleton, remaining their Official Medical Provider.
data.description: A major leader in national medical imaging services, RAYUS Radiology, has recently announced their continuation as an Official Medical Provider for all three main US winter sports organizations. This includes providing advanced diagnostic and interventional medical imaging services. The agreement, effective from January 28, 2026, solidifies RAYUS Radiology's prominent role in supporting winter sports in the United States.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, and Dogecoin stable after Fed holds rates. Bitcoin at $89,596, Ethereum $3,023, XRP $1.91, DOGE $0.1255. 90,316 traders liquidated, losing $281.97 million in 24 hours. Sentiment cautious despite gains for Hyperliquid, DoubleZero, Canton.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently trading below $90,000, standing at $89,596, while Ethereum is at $3,023, Solana at $126.06, XRP at $1.91, Dogecoin at $0.1255, and Shiba Inu at $0.057737. The Federal Reserve has maintained the expected interest rate hold, influencing the market. Coinglass data reveals that 90,316 traders were liquidated in the past day, totaling $281.97 million. Hyperliquid, DoubleZero, and Canton were among the gainers in the last 24 hours. The cautious sentiment towards Bitcoin and Ethereum is notable, contrasting with the performance of Gold and Silver. For more details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Coinbase introduces prediction markets in the US, powered by Kalshi for American customers.
data.description: A popular United States-based cryptocurrency exchange, Coinbase, has introduced its prediction markets product, utilizing technology from Kalshi.

data.title: OnePay launches free in-app tax filing for customers, simplifying taxes and payments. NEW YORK, Jan. 28, 2026 /PRNewswire.
data.description: OnePay Cash users now have the convenience of filing their taxes, directing refunds to OnePay Cash, and settling outstanding payments all within the OnePay app. The announcement was made in New York on January 28, 2026. OnePay, a leading consumer fintech platform, with millions of American users, aims to streamline the tax process for its customers.

data.title: Precision Additive launches PA-300, fastest AI LPBF 3D metal printer. Produces high-quality components.
data.description: In Noblesville, Indiana, on January 28, 2026, Precision Additive revealed the release of their inaugural metal additive manufacturing machine, the PA-300. This new laser powder bed fusion (LPBF) printer is engineered to create top-notch, certification-ready parts. The PA-300 aims to revolutionize the production process, offering advanced capabilities to cater to a variety of needs in the industry.

data.title: Voyager Ventures closes $275M Fund II for investments in advanced energy, materials production, AI, targeting industrial growth.
data.description: A recent announcement revealed that Voyager Ventures has launched a new fund, Fund II, with a substantial investment of $275 million. This fund will be focused on financing advanced energy systems, materials production, and applied artificial intelligence to drive industrial growth. The fund will primarily target energy, industrials, and climate technology sectors. The announcement was made in San Francisco, New York, and London on January 28, 2026.
